title: Update bd swarm to use cascade-aware ClassifySteps and FindReadySteps
description:
Modify internal/cmd/swarm.go and internal/graph/graph.go:

1. Add cascade bool parameter to ClassifySteps() and FindReadySteps() in graph package. When cascade=true, additionally check IsEffectivelyBlocked for each task.

2. Update swarm validate, swarm status, and swarm create to read cascade config flag and pass it through.

This primarily affects tasks in sub-parents of a swarm where cross-parent deps now cascade correctly. Update swarm_test.go. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'bd swarm' section.
